CustomField.formula: IMAGE( CASE(Phase__c, "Finanzierung genehmigt", "/img/samples/light_green.gif", "Bankantrag", "/img/samples/light_yellow.gif", "Finanzierungsanfrage gestellt", "/img/samples/light_red.gif", "VSA vorhanden", "/img/samples/light_red.gif", "Rückfragen gestellt", "/img/samples/light_red.gif", "Unterlagen angefordert", "/img/samples/light_red.gif", "Finanzierung pausiert", "/img/samples/light_red.gif", "Finanzierung verloren", "/img/samples/light_red.gif", "/s.gif"), "Status Farbe")
CustomField.label: Status
